title: Using `with` (Context Managers)
prompt_md: Write `count_lines(text)` that counts how many non-empty lines are in `text`. Use `io.StringIO` (an in-memory text stream) opened with a `with` block, iterate its lines, and return the count as an `int`.
hints: `with io.StringIO(text) as f:` gives you a file-like object.
Iterate `for line in f:` and count lines where `line.strip()` is non-empty.
